required_states: GuardDuty delegated administrator designated in each desired Region
same delegated administrator account across enabled Regions

conditions: GuardDuty is enabled and a delegated administrator is designated in each desired Region.
decision_context: Use when designing organization-wide threat-detection coverage.
exclusions: Opt-in Region ordering and account state can affect auto-enable behavior.

source_references.locator: Considerations and recommendations > A delegated GuardDuty administrator account is Regional; same administrator across Regions
source_references.supported_proposition: GuardDuty organization administration has explicit Regional scope and administrator consistency requirements.

statement: GuardDuty delegated-administrator relationships and organization auto-enable configuration operate per AWS Region, even though the same delegated administrator account must be used across enabled Regions.
